programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the medical profession, drug companies, the food industry and government agencies are suppressing a cure for cancer.
programme.sub-title: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Center of the Earth

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?
programme.sub-title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.
programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.
programme.sub-title: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: Secrets of Britain: Secrets of Scotland Yard
programme.desc: No police institution in the world captures the public imagination like Scotland Yard. From the world's most famous serial killer to the biggest jewelry heist in history, see how Scotland Yard has sown the seeds of modern-day policing.

programme.title: Secrets of Britain: Secrets of Underground London
programme.desc: On the surface, London is a buzzing, modern metropolis—but underneath lies a hidden world. Uncover 2000 years of subterranean history, including a world of perfectly preserved Roman remains, gruesome plague pits and top secret bunkers.

programme.title: Secrets of Britain: Secrets of Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Her Majesty's Secret Service is the world's oldest and most famous spy agency. Witness the truth behind the covert operations, the tales of treachery and the double-agents who've risked their lives.
programme.sub-title: Secrets of Her Majesty's Secret Service

programme.title: Secrets of Britain: Secrets of Westminster
programme.desc: The Houses of Parliament and Big Ben are the classic London emblems of historic British democracy. Go inside its gothic walls and discover the hidden worlds of the House of Commons and the House of Lords.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Alexander Becomes Great
programme.desc: The victory by Alexander, henceforth known as the Great, is total. He steps into History and is now master of the entire known world.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: A Little Trip to the Moon
programme.desc: It’s the Cold War between the USSR and the USA
programme.sub-title: A Little Trip to the Moon

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: A Bus for Martin Luther King
programme.desc: The early 20th century in the US South. Segregation against the black community is rife.
programme.sub-title: A Bus for Martin Luther King

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Bouvines: France in Peril
programme.desc: The 12th and 13th centuries of our era are the stage for several conflicts between Capetians and Plantagenets.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Einstein and the Manhattan Project
programme.desc: Albert Einstein, a confirmed pacifist, flees Nazi Germany and takes refuge in the United States.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Confucius and Chinese Thought
programme.desc: The struggle for power has rendered the situation unstable and the ancient Zhou dynasty has lost its role as unifier and peace-broker.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Adrianople: Rome Against the Barbarians
programme.desc: A stroke is at the origin of the destruction of the most powerful empire ever known.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Internet, the Origins of the Web
programme.desc: By standing out against the consumer society, Tim Berners-Lee made all this possible.
programme.sub-title: The Internet, the Origins of the Web

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Genghis Khan, the Empire of the Steppes
programme.desc: The kidnapping of his wife turned Temüjin into Genghis Khan.
programme.sub-title: Genghis Khan, the Empire of the Steppes

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Darwin Discovering the World
programme.desc: The shape of Darwin’s nose almost prevented one of the greatest revolutions in the history of science.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Chernobyl, a Reactor Out of Control
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster is the most serious ever recorded on our planet: a nuclear accident that is 7 on a scale of 7.
programme.sub-title: Chernobyl, a Reactor Out of Control

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Rock, Freedom and Decibels
programme.desc: A young truck driver looking for a present for his mother started it all.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Sekigahara, the Battle of the Samurai

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Aral, a Sea for Cotton

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Cuban Missile Crisis
programme.desc: 1962. The Cold War. American spy planes spot launch ramps in Cuba that are designed for nuclear missiles

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Olympic Games

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Al Capone and Prohibition

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Fall of Quebec

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Gold Rush

programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Billy Idol

programme.title: The Big Interview: Rod Stewart
programme.desc: Rod Stewart is still rocking out fifty years into his career: he has a hit Las Vegas residency, continues to pack arenas around the world, and has a new album out. He's left his mark on rock & roll, and he talks to Dan Rather about his life and legacy.

programme.title: The Big Interview
programme.desc: The multi-talented artist talks about his music, his passion, acting and he shows off his extensive collection of sports memorabilia.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Uncut Story: 1942-1961

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Snoop Dogg
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Snoop Dogg. Snoop Dogg's story is told chronologically through his major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Jennifer Lopez

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jacqueline Poole

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Creeped out

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I can't rationlise it!!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did you just say something?"
programme.desc: In the very first episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to North Yorkshire. Amongst other things, they investigate a ghostly photograph taken by a member of the public. What will the team uncover during their overnight paranormal investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That's got to be them!
programme.desc: Sara and Jane return to a venue they investigated many years ago, this time with Phil and Dale. Phil and Sara have an anxious time in the basement, Dale and Jane are shocked by unexplained heavy footsteps, and don’t even mention the lift…or spiders.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Someone watching

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Paper cut-out man"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Fight or flight"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Something foreboding"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Can you not?"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Total creep out!"

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Sweetheart Swindler
programme.desc: An elderly conman confesses to a thirty-year career of breaking hearts and bank accounts.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: A Killer In Disguise
programme.desc: In March of 1994, Orange County, California is being targeted by a gunman, who is a master of disguises. As each attack grows increasingly more violent, police must stop him before he turns deadly..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The High Rolling Reverend
programme.desc: A charismatic Reverend shears more than nine million dollars from his flock of 1,600 churches.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Badge Of Terror
programme.desc: A Miami-Dade police officer descends into depravity when he conducts voodoo sex and has sex with prostitutes. It leads to the abduction, torture, and murder of two women

programme.title: Very Bad Men: B.T.K.
programme.desc: A teenage boy comes home to find his family has been slaughtered. The mysterious murderer taunts police for decades, leaving clues, letters and even photographs he has taken from his own crime scenes

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A friendly priest is dubbed “Father Feeler” by dozens of young girls, and is finally brought to justice by the women who could not forget their past

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Spin Doctor
programme.desc: A serial sexual predator uses his charm and talent for disguise to lure in successful women and then brutally rapes them

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Hell On Wheels
programme.desc: When two Pasadena, Texas teenagers go missing in 1990, everyone assumes that the young lovers are runaways. But after cryptic phone call leads to a grisly murder scene, police and FBI must find a sexual deviant before he can kill again

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Captured Alive
programme.desc: When a Witt, Texas home is destroyed by fire in 2011, police are unaware that an arson investigation will soon lead them on a statewide hunt for a sexual predator.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Bayou Strangler
programme.desc: A predator lurks in the hot summer of 2005, preying on the vulnerable young men of Louisiana's streets. The sexually sadistic serial killer lures his victims with a cunning rouse, leaving a trail of bodies in his wake

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Center City Rapist
programme.desc: A soft-spoken and apparently shy young man turns out to be terrifying predator and serial rapist.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In the small town of Carleton Place, Ontario, on the morning of November 10th, 1994, Garry Samuels drove himself and his wife, Barbara Lanthier, into the Mississippi River. He escaped but claimed he was unable to save his wife.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Scenario for a Murder
programme.desc: Since October 10th 2008, no-one has seen friendly 38 year-old bachelor John Altinger. All that his friends know is that he was going to a garage in a residential area of Edmonton, to meet a woman he’d met on an online dating site.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: On August 4th, 2008, kayakers found a 40-year-old homeless man, Mark Hanley, floating near the marina in Nanaimo, British Columbia. He had been severely beaten and stabbed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: Two girls are attacked by a man armed with a baseball bat. One of them manages to escape but the second one is found in a salmon river. The killer nags the police for months until he leaves behind a telling clue.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stealth Stalker
programme.desc: When Terri Mendez breaks up with Jose, she doesn't know he's watching every move she makes. When Terri discovers hidden cameras in her bedroom, she realizes there's nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: A friendly nurse offers odd jobs to a struggling man who quickly becomes infatuated with her. Despite her rejections to his advances, the married man will not take "no" for an answer.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Signed, Your Deadliest Fan
programme.desc: A successful comic book author and illustrator encounters a fan who wants far more than an autograph.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Prisoner of Love
programme.desc: Katerina Brunot thinks she's met the man of her dreams in Frank Sheridan. But it all becomes a brutal nightmare when Frank turns her into his slave and frames her for a violent crime.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When Harvette Williams gives her business card to Kevin Gary, she has no idea that she's inviting an obsessive stalker into her life.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: El Niño
programme.desc: It is estimated that between 1997 and 1998, “El Niño” took the lives of 24,000 people and created a startling $34 billion (US) in economic damages worldwide. In this episode we explain what “El Niño” is.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Tornado is one of Mother Nature’s most extraordinary phenomena. These intense, rapidly rotating columns of air can attain wind speeds of more than 480 kilometres per hour, and have been witnessed on every continent except Antarctica.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Avalanches
programme.desc: We tend to think of disasters as inevitable - but often Mother Nature gives us vital clues which we foolishly ignore or overlook. This episode will take a close look at avalanches and what we can learn about how, where, and why they strike.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Mosquitoes
programme.desc: In 2014, Microsoft Founder Bill Gates described the mosquito as the “deadliest animal in the world.” It is estimated by the World Health Organisation that they kill roughly 750,000 people per year.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Earthquakes
programme.desc: Many of our most densely populated cities are situated on the Earth’s most seismically active fault lines. Deadly, highly destructive, and impossible to predict, Earthquakes are truly one of Mother Nature’s most terrifying forces.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hawaii: Surf & Snow
programme.desc: In Hawaii George explores the wild side: diving with Galapagos sharks, ascending to snow-covered Mauna Kea, dental cleaning by Peppermint Cleaner Shrimp, extreme surfing at Banzai Pipeline, getting his boots lit on fire by Kilauea volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Heatwaves
programme.desc: Temperatures in places like Saudi Arabia routinely exceed 40 degrees Celsius with very little effect on the population. However, when the same extreme heat struck the people of Russia in 2010, it killed an estimated 56,000 people.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Landslides
programme.desc: Nothing can be done to prevent a landslide once it starts; they are among the most ferocious and devastating forces in nature.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Famine
programme.desc: Every continent on Earth has experienced this terrifying phenomenon at some point in its history. It’s ravaged the world for centuries, as crop infestation, drought, flooding and disease have killed thousands.

programme.title: Luke Gamble's Vet Adventures: Thailand
programme.desc: Luke aids a dog shelter that is desperate for veterinary help, visits a hill tribe village where he meets a monk who rescues chickens used for fighting, and helps elephants marred by land mines.

programme.title: Luke Gamble's Vet Adventures: Malawi
programme.desc: Luke visits a country with hardly any vets where he faces the challenges of saving a starved dog with a new litter of pups, anesthetizing a leopard, and tracking in the bush, where he meets a troop of over familiar baboons!

programme.title: Max's Big Tracks: Amazon Trek: In search of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Max heads to the Amazon basin to find a jaguar.
programme.sub-title: Amazon Trek: In search of the Jaguar

programme.desc: Max goes in search of elephants in the Namibian desert; Max heads out on his own to find the rare animals.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Grin and Bear a 'Cuda
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: General Lee Considered
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Thunder from Down Under
programme.desc: When the local junkyard closes its doors Mark and Dougie have to rescue an old friend from the earliest days of Graveyard Carz. But their journey appears to be cursed by a sudden increase in thunder and lightning.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Allysa's Billboard Hit
programme.desc: Allysa and Dougie finish building out the 440 engine for the 1968 GTX currently in assembly. And Allysa and Mark begin one of the most difficult decal applications a White Billboard for the 1970 Cuda' Convertible.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mopar or No Car
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Reel Life of GYC
programme.desc: Since 2012 Graveyard Carz has become synonymous with high-quality Mopar Restoration. And the show continues to grow with new fans and new builds each and every year. We pull the curtain back to reveal some of the cast and crew's favorite moments.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Parking In-Violetion
programme.desc: In our second to last episode of the season the ghouls shift into high gear to make progress on our In-Violet 1971 'Cuda Convertible. And work begins on our SEMA 2019 build!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Tiny Dancer Strikes Again!
programme.desc: Mark illuminates the ultra-rare option of Mopar sunroofs while the team tackles the task of restoring a real M51 power sunroof 1969 Charger R/T SE sunroof.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This is Boring
programme.desc: With the shop already filled with restorations Mark takes a road-trip to Boring Oregon to look at a new restoration project. When it turns out to be an unusually well-preserved muscle-car Mark works outside his comfort zone to close the deal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mark's Little Demon
programme.desc: The famous 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon 340 6-pack is cruising through the shop.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: "Yeah it's hopped up to over 160"
programme.desc: The 1970 Challenger Vanishing Point tribute car is back! A major dream project for Mark is the creation of a series of Alpine White 1970 Dodge Challenger R/T tribute cars modeled after the iconic Mopar featured in the film "Vanishing Point".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Memento Mori
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz has restored its fair share of 1971 'Cudas so what makes this 1971 Hemi Shaker 'Cuda so different? Don't worry we won't ruin the surprise. This is the first time in Graveyard Carz broadcasts that the car will be revealed backwards!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Hellephant in the Room
programme.desc: At SEMA 2018 Mark was gifted the first third-generation 426 Hemi-Crate engine by Mopar and now must decide which car he's going to install it in for SEMA 2019. Meanwhile Will begins paint-prep on a beautiful Rallye Red 1970 Plymouth 'Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Road Running Home
programme.desc: Good news from Mark's daughter Allyssa! She's pregnant with her fourth child and this time Mark will have a grandson! Unfortunately Mark needs to find a replacement to help with his pet project "The Autopsy Report".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: One for the Road Movie
programme.desc: The Vanishing Point Challenger has not disappeared from view. After years of gathering rust in the Graveyard this 1970 Alpine White Challenger R/T tribute car has been cleaned up and has received most of its sheet metal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Ice-Trey 200
programme.desc: To celebrate the 200th episode of Graveyard Carz Mark and the Ghoulz visit a private automotive museum!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Steals A Wife
programme.desc: Duke, Jed’s bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and Mlle. Denise, a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys The Freeway
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl and a Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Becomes A Banker
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Cuts The Family Tree
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out if the Clampetts did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Spring Tonic
programme.desc: Granny hands around the Spring Tonic to the family, giving Jed a double dose. At the bank, Gloria transforms herself into a gorgeous secretary, with her sights set on Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Pays His Income Tax
programme.desc: Granny thinks a man from the IRS is a revenuer and chases him off with her gun.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts And The Dodgers
programme.desc: Leo Durocher wants to sign Jethro as a pitcher on the Dodgers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Becomes A Father
programme.desc: Jed falls for a beautiful Beverly Hills matron.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Entertain
programme.desc: Drysdale comes up for a raise when he lands the Clampett account.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts In Court
programme.desc: As the Clampetts are going to the bank, a car bumps into them. When the Johnsons in the car learn how much money the Clampetts have, they decide to sue them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed
programme.desc: An unlucky psychiatrist somehow winds up with Jethro as a patient.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted
programme.desc: The psychiatrist shows an interest in Granny’s mountain remedies.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Ellie Becomes A Secretary
programme.desc: The Clampetts offer to help out at Drysdale’s bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro's Friend
programme.desc: The Clampetts show Jethro’s friend how to have some fun

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Gets The Misery
programme.desc: Jed feels poorly, and the family is worried about him. To make Elly feel better, Jed reveals that he is faking an illness to please Granny. Drysdale fakes an illness as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Hair-Raising Holiday
programme.desc: A doctor blows the whistle on Granny’s mountain-medicine practice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Garden
programme.desc: Granny wants to plough the front lawn of the mansion to grow vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Starts To School
programme.desc: Elly May is preparing for her first day of the Willows, a finishing school Mrs. Drysdale recommended where she hopes the girls will offend Elly and run the Clampetts out of town.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: Shooting Gallery: Asteroids and Comets / Galactic Visions: Alien Worlds

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Milky Way

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity / Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System

programme.desc: Two convicts get freed from prison and become lawmen in a corrupt village.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: diamond dog caper
programme.desc: When young Owen rescues a lovable dog from a gang of jewel thieves, he's unaware that the dog is carrying a stash of stolen diamonds. The thieves will do anything to get the jewels back, but Owen is determined to keep his new found friend.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: After a less than perfect performance at her last competition, 16-year-old Kelly moves from the US to Australia to get away from her high-pressure life as a gymnast.

programme.title: My New Best Friend
programme.desc: A spunky and resourceful 11-year-old begins helping a local police officer with his K-9 partner while simultaneously dealing with her own family issues.

programme.title: Heaven Must Wait

programme.title: Smi
programme.desc: A mischievous thirteen-year-old crosses paths with a lovable mutt named Smitty, and with help from the unlikely canine companion, learns the importance of friendship, family and responsibility.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet's rarest and most spectacular creatures and it harbors some of the most extreme environments on Earth.
programme.sub-title: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering a fifth of the earth's surface, the Arctic tundra is one of the coldest places on the planet. The piercing temperatures and powerful winds challenge even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Arctic Ocean: The Frozen Sea
programme.desc: The film follows a year in the High Arctic, where life is exceptionally entwined with the seasons. Journey to the Arctic where in winter, the sun doesn't rise for months on end, but in the summer thaws out in an explosion of life.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.
programme.sub-title: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Predator: Leonard John Fraser
programme.desc: Serial killer Leonard Fraser was suspected of killing at least five women over a 17 year period but took the complete truth about his life of crime to his grave.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.
programme.sub-title: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder
programme.desc: On a September night in 1986, two police officers climbed through a barbed-wire fence beside the F4 freeway at Minchinbury in Sydney’s west.
programme.sub-title: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron
programme.desc: Rodney Francis Cameron was dubbed ‘The Lonely Hearts Killer’ after he used a radio match-making program in 1990 to lure an unsuspecting woman to her death. Incredibly, he had only just been released from prison for two other killings in 1974.
programme.sub-title: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.
programme.sub-title: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.
programme.sub-title: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Disappearance of Donald Mackay
programme.desc: A small group of local criminals with mafia connections were making vast fortunes in the famous NSW Riverina irrigation district from marijuana plantations.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster
programme.desc: Crime Investigation Australia has conducted a major investigation which reveals the inside story of the Megan Kalajzich murder and the extraordinary police investigation which will rock the Harbour City's elite to the core.
programme.sub-title: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.
programme.sub-title: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Greenough, near Geraldton in Western Australia, some 400 kilometres north of Perth, will forever be associated with one the most horrific murders in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop in Delaware, where they help their new host family with a space problem, while their internship is at a lively daycare center.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole continue their travels through Maryland, living with a host family who Paris offers to cook for, and working at a bakery.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: As their latest internship with a psychic is only a short distance away, Paris and Nicole remain at the Foot family home, where they attempt to match make.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Back in New Jersey, Paris and Nicole work at an elderly living center, where they give the seniors a day to remember, before teaching their host family about the cruelty of hunting.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stay with a mother and son in Miami whose unusual pets prove useful for their ad agency internship, which involves creating a campaign for a new breakfast sandwich.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Havoc ensues when Paris and Nicole begin an internship with the Atlantic City Fire Department, while they task themselves with finding the daughter of their host family a new friend.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls intern at a manufacturing firm where their work proves dull, however they manage to have fun with their host family.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stay with a family in Tennessee, where they play matchmakers once more, while their internship is with a wedding planner.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Before they leave for New York, Paris and Nicole stay with the family of a former beauty queen, who convinces Paris to take part in a pageant, while their internship is at a dentist's office.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take the place of a stay-at-home mom who has a young daughter, and also happens to be nine months pregnant!

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole trade in their designer dresses for traditional Pakistani attire when they take over the responsibilities of a Pakistani housewife.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole fill in for a housewife who feels her marriage is lacking a spark.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole spend the day tending to the needs and whims of four rambunctious kids.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole plan competing weddings for a lesbian couple.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole must take care of a toddler, as well as throw a party for his second birthday.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take a break from household chores and go on a family vacation.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are paired with a hard-to-please husband.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole visit an artistic family with varied talents.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris can’t stand to spend another day as a housewife and hires an impersonator to take her place, giving Nicole an opportunity to exact her revenge.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie say goodbye to their jet-setting lifestyle in Los Angeles, and move in with the Ledings, a family in Altus, Arkansas.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a dairy farm operated by Albert’s no-nonsense friend, but after tiring of the hard work and smell, they head for a nearby hot tub… and end up getting fired.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a fast-food restaurant, but they’re bored and frustrated by the demands of the job, and soon rebel by pulling pranks during each of their assignments; when the Ledings reprimand them, the girls just go out dancing.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole agree to be honorary co-chairs of the Springtime Gala, but instead of working at the gala, they engage in their usual shocking behavior; the Ledings are embarrassed, and everyone in town is gossiping about Paris and Nicole.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls go to work for a cattle auctioneer, but when they’re sent to buy cattle feed, they charge several other items without permission; the auctioneer comes after them for the money, and the girl try to lie their way out of the debt.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole finally get a job they enjoy: working at a gas station, where there are plenty of guys to flirt with; but a confrontation erupts when Albert and Janet tell the girls to stay away from the small town boys, and the girls disobey them.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reminisce about their month in Altus, make amends, and say goodbye to the people they’ve come to know before returning to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Leeza Gibbons hosts a look back at Paris’ and Nicole’s stay in Altus, Arkansas, as the girls reunite with the Leding family in front of a studio audience.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole depart from Miami Beach toward their first destination, the Batten Family Ranch.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole get jobs at Weeki Wachee Springs in Florida and play a surprising game of hide-and-seek with their boss's daughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work as maids at the Caliente Nudist Colony and learn the meaning of the word "termination."

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: While staying with a host family, Nicole butts heads with their oldest son and decides to give him a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: In the swamplands of Louisiana, Paris and Nicole meet their next host family and make a big impression after taking their daughter on a shopping spree; the women get jobs trapping crawfish.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: A stop in Texas brings Paris and Nicole to their new host family; the women convince the Lutz-Carillos boys to sneak out with them to go tanning.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole adjust to a rule against profanity in the household of their new hosts, devout members of a gospel choir; the pair get jobs with a minor league baseball team.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The cross-country journey takes Paris and Nicole to Texas, where they try to help the host family's teenage son with his homework and take jobs at a local hair salon.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop at a ranch in Texas, where they give the father tips on being romantic with his wife; the pair get jobs at the local sheriff's station but their wild antics do not impress the boss.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work on a cattle drive in Texas but take matters into their own hands when they discover the herd is going to the slaughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Never-before-aired footage augments commentary by families and employers who hosted Paris and Nicole.
programme.sub-title: The Stuffs We Weren't Allowed to Show You

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: After once again giving up their lives of luxury, Paris and Nicole take a bus to stay with their first host family and prepare for their first internship as car mechanics.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls move on to Staten Island, where they live with an Italian-American family and do an internship at an advertising agency, where they clash with their straitlaced supervisor.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole arrive in Pennsylvania, where they stay with a family whose cat injures Nicole's dog, while their internship involves working at an airport.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Island Hopper

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Power
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.
