programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The Park Kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets. A rainy day has everyone stuck in the Caboose. Barney suggests fun activities.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the Park Kids to play with her instead of working in a garden. RIFF plays detective to track down the source of a mysterious sound in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney can't stop snacking on pistachios! Barney helps BJ explore the deeper meaning of team sports and friendships.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isn’t satisfied with the things she can do. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. Baby Bop is not sure she likes this idea at first.
programme.sub-title: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Come Blow Your Horn!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Labour And Love
programme.desc: More tears, tiffs and true love in Teen Mom UK. Megan has a baby, Amber has a meltdown, and romance is in the air for Mia. Sassi celebrates her 1st Mother's Day and Chloe tackles her weight. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Lads Trip
programme.desc: Megan welcomes a new addition to the family... a horse! Chloe heads to the gym while Jordan heads to Amsterdam. There are fireworks for Amber and Ste, and Sassi plans a Christening. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Drama's For Nerds Part 1
programme.desc: All the girls head to LA to film specials and the reunion. Kailyn and Briana finally come face to face and Chelsea and Jenelle choose sides, but Leah is caught in the middle.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Drama's For Nerds Part 2: Hallway to Hell
programme.desc: Jenelle and David return for a monstrous showdown with Nathan and Barb, while Kail, Leah and Chelsea try to get Jenelle and Briana kicked off the show.
programme.sub-title: Drama's For Nerds Part 2: Hallway to Hell

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bitter Baby Mama
programme.desc: Briana visits Delaware for Lincoln's birthday but does not get a warm welcome from Kailyn. David is upset when Nathan butts into his relationship with Jenelle. Leah takes Gracie to therapy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Unicorn Poop
programme.desc: Leah gets a surprising call from Jeremy during the twins' birthday. Kail goes to court with Lux's dad. Jenelle takes a birthday vacation with all her children. Chelsea faces off with Adam.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Quicksand
programme.desc: Javi gets some work news that puts pressure on his relationships with both Briana and Kailyn. Chelsea and Cole confront Adam's parents for the first time since court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Access Issues
programme.desc: Briana finds out about Javi's big plans, Kail has to go to court mediation with Jo, Leah tries to rehome some unexpected guests, and Jenelle and David get a visit from the sheriff's office.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Thirsty
programme.desc: Briana and Javi make major choices about their relationship and Javi turns to Kailyn. Ali's health issues become more obvious, worrying Leah. Chelsea surprises Cole with the baby's gender.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Forgot about Dre
programme.desc: Briana asks an ex to take care of her after her plastic surgery but Javi isn't happy. Jenelle spends one-on-one time with Jace at therapy. Aubree and Cole go off to a Father/Daughter dance.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Leah and Kailyn vacation together in Hawaii. Chelsea and Aubree meet up with Taylor and Adam's younger daughter, Paislee. Briana heads to her surgery, but receives an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Road Rage
programme.desc: Jenelle encounters an aggressive driver while taking Jace home. Briana has some surprise visitors after surgery. Leah gets troubling news. Kailyn and Jo go back to court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: On the Mend
programme.desc: Briana faces DeVoin as she heals from surgery. After a disheartening doctor's visit, Leah receives an update on Ali's condition. Adam violates his visitation agreement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Seaon 8 Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of the explosive two-part reunion, Chelsea, Leah, Kailyn, Jenelle and Briana join Dr Drew to discuss the highs and lows of this past season.
programme.sub-title: Seaon 8 Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 8 Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 2
programme.desc: The explosive two-part reunion continues. Chelsea, Leah, Kailyn, Jenelle and Briana join Dr Drew to discuss the highs and lows of this past season.
programme.sub-title: Season 8 Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 2

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 8 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Unseen Moments. Jenelle, Kailyn, Chelsea, Leah and Briana join Nessa to react to a collection of hilarious and intense never-before-seen clips from Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Madness Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a look back at the biggest and most dramatic moments from past Teen Mom 2 reunions.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion: Part I
programme.desc: Reunion Part 1. Dr Drew and Nessa discuss Kailyn and Briana's fight with the cast and look back on the biggest events that happened this season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion: Part II
programme.desc: Reunion Part 2. Dr Drew and Nessa talk to Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn, Leah and the rest of the cast about all the explosive moments from this season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 8 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Unseen Moments. After the reunion fallout, Dr Drew sits down with Kailyn and Barb to check out the best unseen moments from this season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion: Behind the Screams
programme.desc: Behind The Screams. The beef between Kailyn and Briana erupts when the cast comes to New York for reunion weekend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maci
programme.desc: Maci is the classic overachiever and cheerleader. Now that's all set to change as she's pregnant and planning to graduate early and move in with her boyfriend, Ryan.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Farrah
programme.desc: Meet Farrah, a popular high-school cheerleader. As if being pregnant isn't difficult enough, she is facing difficulties with the father of the baby, her friends and her mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Amber
programme.desc: In this episode, we follow Amber, who's expecting a baby with her boyfriend Gary. They decide to move in together but it's not always easy for these teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ebony
programme.desc: Ebony and Josh both have dreams of joining the Air Force, but that may have to change now that Ebony is pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Whitney
programme.desc: Not only is 16 year old Whitney pregnant, but so is her mother! Watch her prepare to become both a big sister and a mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Catelynn
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler both have very dramatic home lives, and it gets even more complicated when Catelynn falls pregnant. They have some important choices to make, but can they cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Life After Labour
programme.desc: In this special episode Dr. Drew Pinsky discusses each girl's episode, issues and challenges and update us on what's going on now. There will also be questions from viewers and the audience.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Drew. A look back at the undiscovered stories from season one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jenelle
programme.desc: Jenelle, a North Carolina beach bunny who loves partying, realizes her long-distance boyfriend isn't coming back, and that she's too immature to raise a baby herself.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Nikkole
programme.desc: Nikki is a prankster princess whose posse of friends love her, but hate her boyfriend. Can she convince her friends and family that Josh is worthy of being a father to their son?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Chelsea
programme.desc: Popular high school senior Chelsea loves her school life and her boyfriend Adam. She thinks life will be the same after she gives birth, but instead learns this may not be the case.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lori
programme.desc: Lori's parents want her to choose adoption, but as someone who was adopted herself, she doesn't want her baby to be haunted by all that's haunted her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha is a cute, bubbly 'good girl' who never missed a homework assignment, but she devastates her family when she follows in her mother's footsteps and becomes a teen mum.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Nicole
programme.desc: Nicole is dating a 15-year-old, and although they're in love, not everyone in the family is supportive. They both have a lot of growing up to do when a baby joins the picture.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Leah
programme.desc: West Virginia cheerleader Leah is having twins with a boy she was dating for one month. If that wasn't hard enough, she develops health issues that put the babies' lives at risk.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lizzie
programme.desc: Lizzie's pregnancy forces her to drop out of high school and the marching band. She looks to her boyfriend Skylar for support... until she discovers he hasn't always been faithful.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kailyn
programme.desc: Kailyn's mum moved in with her new boyfriend, forcing Kailyn to live with her young boyfriend's family while she attempts to go to college.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Brooke
programme.desc: After a shotgun wedding, Brooke and Cody are forced to sacrifice car racing for parenthood. Now they're trying to balance high school life and moving in to their own place.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Felicia
programme.desc: The youngest of five, Felicia's the only one in her family with a shot at graduating. But when it gets tough with her boyfriend and she leaves home, will she be forced to drop out?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, an all-American girl, has to leave her majorette baton and boyfriend behind, as she moves an hour away and faces the pressure of starting over in a new school and town.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Rush to Judgement
programme.desc: The CSIs must piece together a human jigsaw puzzle when a beloved wrestling coach's severed body parts are found buried throughout the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY: She’s Not There
programme.desc: A Russian tourist is found stabbed to death and the CSIs come face to face with the frightening realities of human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Party's Over
programme.desc: When the Mayor's dead body falls from the ceiling at a charity fundraiser, Stella and her date find themselves in the middle of the crime scene.

programme.title: CSI: NY: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When a buzzard flying over Manhattan drops a human eyeball from its claw, the race is on to find the body it belongs to.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Green Piece
programme.desc: A lethal pipe bomb blows a Manhattan townhouse and valuable evidence to pieces, forcing the CSIs to get creative in reconstructing evidence.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Point of No Return
programme.desc: A former medical examiner is found murdered, a white powder found at the scene provides the CSIs with a major lead in tracking the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: When a Native American chief is shot, the CSIs struggle to translate which one of the several foreign suspects may have caused his death.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him? During the investigation, Mac discovers that the case is connected to an earlier case involving a missing flash drive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Greater Good
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labor, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify to a grand jury against his father, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Blacklist (Featuring Gravedigger)
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health-care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three-state area. But does the city really have a serial killer on their hands, or is there another explanation?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Battle Scars
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realizes it's the third victim of the Compass Killer. Meanwhile, detective Flack, still dealing with Angell's death, goes AWOL.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Death House
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body, who are still trapped in the building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Second Chances
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flag On The Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Formula
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Payback
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Silencer (aka Dance Of Death)
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Fade Out
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Skeletons
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Deviant
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: CSI steps up the search for potential serial killer who may be connected to a professional photographer after it discovers that Natalia's sister may be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: The death of a Marine recruiter ultimately leads Horatio to open an investigation into the death of a soldier in Iraq. The soldier's brother claims responsibility, but Horatio suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex is found dead at his home, Horatio must step into the investigation to keep his team safe from an overeager investigator.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: The robbery of a police truck containing confiscated weapons is connected to a plot to spring Clavo Cruz from prison, and one of the guns stolen in the robbery is used in the shooting of a young boy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Man Down
programme.desc: While the manhunt for Clavo Cruz continues, Delko fights for his life after the shooting.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A real estate developer is murdered, and the investigation uncovers a complex web of deceit involving his wife her two identical triplet sisters. But the apparently-murdered developer may have had a surprise of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rush
programme.desc: An actor is found dead in the trunk of a stunt car, but the investigation reveals that he actually died in his room at a high-profile celebrity rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Just Murdered
programme.desc: A far from amicable divorce comes to a bigger crisis when bodies start piling up, and Delko falls afoul of a former nemesis when he misses a payment.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Burned
programme.desc: While investigating a possible arson case, Horatio discovers that Yelina is back in Miami working as a private investigator. Meanwhile, Wolfe's prior relationship with one of the suspects gets him in hot water with his superiors.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Switch
programme.desc: While CSI tries to find out who killed a carjacker, Wolfe is forced to become an adversary as he takes a job as a television crime analyst.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dangerous Son
programme.desc: A probation officer is shot and killed, and one of the suspects turns out to be Horatio's biological son.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Cyber-Lebrity
programme.desc: An Internet celebrity's boyfriend is killed with a bow and arrow. During the case, Horatio becomes a "cyberlebrity" himself, which puts his life in danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Inside Out
programme.desc: Horatio goes on a manhunt to find two criminals who escaped from a prison bus after their arraignment. However, he also learns that his son's life is in danger in prison.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect’s bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems to be.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fear Thy Neighbors
programme.desc: The abduction and murder of an 11-year-old girl in an isolated Alaskan village leaves locals fearing they’re being preyed on by an evil outsider until investigators reveal something far more sinister.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Axe Man Cometh
programme.desc: A woman is found slain from what seems to be a burglary gone wrong. A bloody handprint, axe, and evidence from multiple break-ins are key elements investigators use to solve this chilling murder.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 2)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Charlotte
programme.desc: In 1999, Carolina Panther, Rae Carruth was an NFL rookie fast on the rise. That is, until his pregnant girlfriend was gunned down in the suburbs of Charlotte.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Iaeger
programme.desc: The spring of 2005 would bring a horrifying end to the town of Iaeger’s peace and tranquility when beloved physician Doc Whitley was found burned to death in his home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.

programme.title: The Millers: 72
programme.desc: When Tom proudly tells the family he's dating a much younger woman, Nathan goes undercover to spy on him and make sure his father isn't being scammed by a gold digger.

programme.title: The Millers: Sex Ed Dolan
programme.desc: Nathan introduces his boss, Ed Dolan, to Tom in hopes they'll hit it off and hang out together, but surprisingly, Dolan only has eyes for Carol. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man and the Holly

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.
programme.sub-title: An Officer and a Dental Man

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang attends a charity silent auction. Haskell wins a police ride-along. Phil wins dinner with his favorite sitcom TV Mom. Stuart and Holly are forced to share a cooking lesson with a celebrity chef.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s engagement to Congressman Charles Hayward is put in jeopardy when a scandalous photo of her lands in the newspaper. Haskell has an idea for a great new app, but needs an investor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's big day arrives. Haskell and Nicki, now business partners, strike it rich.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly is given a voice-activated operating system as a gift and gets way too attached to him. Haskell comes into money and uses it to control Phil and Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: The Blind Leading The Blind Date

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-Doo
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Altar Boys
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Slaves Of Las Vegas
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: Warrick is in charge for the first time as the team investigates the murder of the con artist, who has run off with some tourists' money only to get shot and killed in the parking lot. The prime suspect in the case turns out to be Captain Brass' daughter.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: A dwarf is found dead, hanged in an auditorium during an annual convention for little people. Working on a case of murder during a home invasion, Catherine is attacked by the perpetrator while processing the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: During a magic show, a female participant really disappears during a disappearing act. Nick and Catherine investigates the death of a rock star found on his tour bus with a needle stuck in his arm.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: When boxing favourite LaRoi Steele dies during the Fight Night against Javier Molina, Grissom investigates for a possible murder. Meanwhile, Nick is assigned to work solo on a jewelry heist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: A murder is caught on tape. With no body or a crime scene, Sara, Warrick and Catherine must get as much information as possible from the grainy 16 mm film. Grissom and Nick must brave a colony of fire ants to recover a body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Lust
programme.desc: A taxi driver accidentally runs over a teenage boy. He is later brutally beaten by a gang who thinks he is running away. Grissom and Sara works on the case and finds that the boy was dead prior to being hit from a stab wound.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: High And Low
programme.desc: A body falls out of the sky, literally. The cause of death is suffocation but the body bears no signs of strangulation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Random Acts Of Violence
programme.desc: Matt Phelps sends his two kids to bed when, out of the blue, there is a drive-by shooting and his daughter Aimee is shot and killed in her bed. Grissom learns that Phelps is Warrick's mentor and friend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: One Hit Wonder
programme.desc: When Joanne Crooks is assaulted in her home, Catherine, Grissom, Nick, Warrick and Capt. Brass assume the investigation. They find fingerprints on the windows and they learn that the criminal is escalating in his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash And Burn
programme.desc: An elderly lady drives her car recklessly into a café for no apparent reason. Meanwhile, a wife dies of carbon monoxide poisoning while her husband does not even though he was sleeping right next to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Precious Metal
programme.desc: A badly decomposed body of a man is found in a chemical waste barrel. The markings on the barrel indicates that it came from a warehouse, now used as an arena for specially-built remote-controlled robots to destroy each other.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Night At The Movies
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an art house cinema while a young shooting victim is found in a storage room with a bizarrely wide bullet hole pattern.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Last Laugh
programme.desc: While performing on the stage, the comedian Dougie Max dies. Grissom, Catherine and Capt. Brass investigate the conclude that he was poisoned by the expensive bottled water Innoko.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: A Life in Crime: Jackie Malton
programme.desc: Retired DCI Jackie Malton tells the story of her rise to become one of the most respected police detectives of her generation and the inspiration for the hit TV drama 'Prime Suspect'.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: In the early hours, police deliver horrible news to parents: their two sons have been attacked in a senseless beating while returning home from a night out.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in her home.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: When a dishevelled toddler is found alone wandering the streets, police return him home where they discover a murder scene.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: At first, a fatal shooting seems like an open and shut case, but something feels off for the investigator who slowly unpicks a web of manipulation and lies.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 16-year-old high school student Kim Bryant is last seen outside a Dairy Queen restaurant. Three weeks later, her body is discovered by three teenage boys hiking on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, a man finds his wife brutally murdered on the kitchen floor.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 17-year old Carla Walker is with her boyfriend Rodney in his car when suddenly the door is ripped open by an unknown assailant. The man beats Rodney with a gun and drags Carla away screaming.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: A heartbroken millionaire marries a much younger woman, ending with a shotgun blast to the stomach and a lethal dose of poison.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: After months of investigation, cops make two discoveries that confirm an expectant mum who disappeared on Christmas Eve had been targeted for murder.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: After months of investigation, cops make two discoveries that confirm an expectant mum who disappeared on Christmas Eve had been targeted for murder.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer
programme.desc: A dedicated mother disappears from suburban Los Angeles, leaving behind three kids and a husband she planned to divorce. Law enforcement determines she's been the victim of a homicide but it takes them nearly two decades to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh reflects on the challenges police faced during their investigation into the 2015 murders of actress Sian Blake and her two sons by her husband, Arthur Simpson-Kent.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh looks back at the highly nuanced investigation into the 2013 murder of 17-year-old Champion Ganda, whose fatal stabbing shocked her East London community.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives Keogh and Dickie investigate the 2000 murder of Tom Cressman by his lover, Jane Andrews, a former royal dresser who went on the run before claiming in her defence that she had been in an abusive relationship.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective inspector Keogh and the team investigate the murder of retired nurse Eulin Hastings, revealing how police inquiries led to the conviction of serial burglar Aaron Fyle.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective Steve Keogh uncovers secrets in Terry Daddow's 1991 contract killing.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Laila Rezk was discovered badly beaten in her own home, she died despite all efforts to revive her. Forensic examination eliminated all traces of fingerprints, except one.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When police found a man on fire, they assumed he did that to himself. His family campaigned for justice for two years and New Scotland Yard re-investigated the case.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths?

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When barman David Morley was beaten to death on London's South Bank, lead detective Nick Scola deduced that the attack was not what it first appeared to be.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: Boeing B-29: Superfortress
programme.desc: The story of the prolonged development and the initially troubled operational history of the Boeing B-29 Superfortress. Forever known as the airframe that dropped the first atomic weapons on Japan, the B-29 lived on well beyond its war years.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: HE-111: Germany’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Heinkel He 111 is one of the most recognised German aircraft of WW2. The broad winged design was a guinea pig for future bombers, with more variants than any other military aircraft of the time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: X-Rated
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had a depraved sex life that he tried to keep hidden from the German public. He was said to be a chronic masturbator, a voyeur and that he engaged in sado-masochistic sex with women.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Family Matters
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's father was a violent, abusive man. His mother doted on her young son. This episode delves deep into the psychology of Hitler as the narcissistic child who grew into a malignant psychopath full of rage and deep hatred.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Suicidal Maidens
programme.desc: Using extensive archival research, this program explores the squalid secrets he lied and killed to protect

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: German Bomber In Liverpool
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII militaria expert Stephen Taylor unearth artefacts from former military sites - starting with a German bomber found in Liverpool.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: WW1 Special
programme.desc: To mark 100 years since the end of the Great War, Suggs and Stephen excavate the site of a huge World War One transit camp at Morn Hill, outside Winchester.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII expert Stephen hunt for souvenirs left by flying ace Douglas Bader and the legendary Duxford Fliers.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Hull Blitz
programme.desc: Stephen Taylor and Suggs are up to their knees in mud in Lincolnshire as they dig up the remains of a Bolton Paul Defiant plane, shot down during the Hull Blitz.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Spitfire
programme.desc: Treasure Hunters Suggs and Stephen Taylor are on the trail of an iconic Mark IX Spitfire in Belgium.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Bombers in Suffolk
programme.desc: In WW2, Suffolk was home to 32 airfields that served as stations for US bombers. Suggs and Stephen hunt for relics of the visiting aircraft.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Forgotten Bomber
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Northern France looking for the remains of an RAF Fairey Battle bomber plane shot down during the days after Dunkirk.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Undercover
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 expert Stephen uncover more historical finds across the UK, this time looking for relics of the 1944 D-Day operation.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Pathfinder
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Cambridgeshire on the former airbase of the Pathfinders Force - the elite flying team whose WW2 exploits were kept top secret.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Bomb Factory
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen are back on the hunt for more relics from World War 2, and hope searching the site of a bomb factory won't yield anything too explosive.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Terrifying Visions
programme.desc: Meet a teen attacked by a ghost, and another who contacts a paranormal being.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Ghost Attacks
programme.desc: Spirits harass the new owner of a farm, and a demon torments a man for years.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Voices of the Dead
programme.desc: Hear what true horror really sounds like when the dead speak to the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Family Phantoms
programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Child Victims
programme.desc: An angry spirit torments a young boy, and a spooky guest crashes a party.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Within These Walls
programme.desc: Meet people who get more than they bargained for when they buy haunted homes.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: An Invitation to Evil (Letting Them In)
programme.desc: An antique buyer brings evil home, and a demonic spirit makes a house call.
programme.sub-title: An Invitation to Evil (Letting Them In)

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Face to Face With Evil
programme.desc: Watch a woman battle a predatory ghost, and see a couple’s shocking discovery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Creatures From Hell
programme.desc: Share the terror of women and children who are stalked by fiendish beings.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Watch harrowing tales of supernatural beings who are bent on causing pain.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dream Home Nightmares
programme.desc: Visit a haunted inn and a dream home that turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented Teens
programme.desc: Witness terrifying apparitions, and see one woman’s horrible dreams come true.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Messages From Beyond
programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.
