programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Triple Crossed
programme.desc: It's week 12 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and one captain's decision to withhold information fractures ties with an important ally.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Trifecta
programme.desc: It's week 13 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season and, with only three weeks left to fish, and the number one position on the line, every Gloucester captain is desperate to stack the deck with bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Knock Out Punch
programme.desc: It's week 14 of the Bluefin tuna season and with less than two weeks of fishing left, the top four Gloucester crews are locked in a tight race to be New England's best Bluefin boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bait and Switch (Finale Part 1)
programme.desc: It's the final week of the season and Hard Merchandise holds a narrow lead over the fleet

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There are less than five days left before the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts closes and the competition will come downto the very last day of fishing

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Masters of Bluefin (Special)
programme.desc: Take a look back at the best moments from previous seasons as the top fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for supremacy while they pursue the elusive Atlantic Bluefin Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Something to Prove
programme.desc: The best fishermen from Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out on the first day of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna and Tequila
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and Erin & Sarah, the father/daughter fishing operation from Portland, Maine, try to keep their lead over the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: May the Fish Be with You
programme.desc: It's week three of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, one captain is forced to choose between two friends on the water.
programme.sub-title: May the Fish Be with You

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: The Desperate Crossing
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Derailed
programme.desc: A train passenger behaves oddly en route to Arizona and then disappears. The next day his bloodied body is found in Texas. Dr. G attempts to piece together this bizarre tragedy.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Whispered Warnings
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Clue Game
programme.desc: Rebecca Davis is found dead in her bed after she fails to show up for work. Dr. G must race against the clock to find out what took this young woman’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: On a Texas highway, a fire is discovered having burnt three bodies beyond recognition. Dr. G finds bullets in the bodies and determines that they were all shot before being set on fire.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Speeds
programme.desc: Motor vehicle fatalities account for many of the cases that come into the morgue. Dr. G offers expertise as to how to get behind the wheel and not wind up on a steel table.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Bite
programme.desc: Roy Cambells is found dead and covered with scratches, his aggressive 80lb dog by his side. Dr. G wonders if the dog could have been responsible for the man's death.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Gene Morrison – Fraudulent Forensics Expert
programme.desc: He faked his own credentials and netted $400,000 of taxpayers money, giving bogus court testimony and investigative services.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: The Conman Kid – Aged Just 13
programme.desc: This 13-year-old pulled off almost half a million dollars worth of fraud, often selling goods that didn’t exist.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Glenn Rycroft – The Cancer Con Artist
programme.desc: The former air steward who faked cancer and raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from his local community.
programme.sub-title: Glenn Rycroft – The Cancer Con Artist

programme.title: 72 Hours: Nightmare
programme.desc: Every woman’s worst nightmare comes to life when a bearded sexual predator starts attacking women in the safety of their own apartments while they are sleeping.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Dead End
programme.desc: A young couple hits the road, hitchhiking across North America. Free spirits keen to explore the world. When the young woman stops phoning home, her father is alarmed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Head in a Bucket
programme.desc: A woman is told by a friend that she was a passenger in a car where she was confronted with a guy's head in a bucket.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Stranger
programme.desc: Bored at home, a retiree takes a job at a 24-hour convenience store. On her third night at work a customer finds her behind the register in a pool of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Ed Gein
programme.desc: Ed Gein murdered two women in the 1950s and was also a body snatcher. He would fashion items out of bones and skin.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Dennis Nilsen
programme.desc: Dennis Nilsen killed at least twelve men in the late 70s and early 80s in Muswell Hill, London.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Handcuffed
programme.desc: A group of violent and sadistic thugs overpower and abduct 19-year-old Kim Case from her driveway. And although they torture and rape her throughout the night, she ultimately proves to be a more formidable adversary than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Nobody's Victim
programme.desc: Late at night on November 3, 1984, suicidal Florida teen Lisa McVey is heading home to end her life. But as she leaves work, a notorious serial killer terrorizing the Tampa area abducts her at gunpoint.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Underground Terror
programme.desc: In the fall of 2006, Elizabeth Shoaf is a smart, bubbly 14-year-old with a bright future. But Elizabeth’s dreamy life becomes a nightmare when depraved madman, Vinson Filyaw, straps a bomb on her.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Roman Polanski
programme.desc: Examining the murder of Roman Polanski's wife and three friends who were killed by Manson's cult.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Bonny Lee Bakley is shot to death outside a neighborhood Italian restaurant in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elderly Executioners
programme.desc: Ray and Faye Copeland would become America‚an oldest couple on death row when a simple livestock scam escalated into murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: On a rainy night in Edmonton, Alberta police are called to a remote trucking yard.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Blacktown Boys
programme.desc: The body of a local beauty queen is found in a farmer‚Äôs field near Sydney, Australia, and the entire country is riveted.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Butcher of St. Ustache
programme.desc: Near Montreal, a husband comes home from work and finds his wife bound, gagged and shot in the head.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Peter John Peters: The Tattoo Man
programme.desc: A weeklong crime spree began with the murder of a young woman, found naked, stabbed and strangled in the closet of an abandoned apartment in London, Ontario.
programme.sub-title: Peter John Peters: The Tattoo Man

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boardinghouse Killer
programme.desc: Dorothea Puente provided shelter for the infirm in her boardinghouse. It wasn't until a body was found in her yard that authorities realized she was not who she appeared to be.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: In 1985, a brutal killer had Southern Californians fearing for their lives.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Russians Are Killing
programme.desc: It is just another meeting for Los Angeles real estate developer Meyer Muscatel. Unfortunately Muscatel meets with a Russian immigrant with murderous intent.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Candy Man
programme.desc: On August 8, 1973, police in Pasadena, Texas received a phone call from a young man who had just committed murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The BTK Strangler
programme.desc: In 1974, a man identifying himself as the BTK (Bind, Torture, Kill) Strangler started a killing spree in Kansas spanning the next two decades.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: A common-law couple was found guilty of the 1990 rape and murder of Taunja Bennett near Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Murderous Mastermind
programme.desc: In downtown Edmonton, a prominent business owner is found shot to death in his business.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Wrong Thing to Eat
programme.desc: The team is sent to assist a partially sighted pillion passenger hurt in a crash involving her boyfriend's motorbike. The paramedics also try to save a toddler choking on a toy.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: From the Neck Down
programme.desc: The flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance head to the Peak District where a mountainbiker has sustained a broken neck.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes goes to the rescue of an RAF medic seriously ill on a platform at New Street Station and Steve Harris helps a pensioner who's had a nasty fall at market.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Steve Harris comes to the aid of a woman who has fallen head first down the stairs of a bus. Adrian is called to a house fire to rule out any foul play, and has to seize a car which is dangerous.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: A 9 year olds been knocked over on his way to school and biker paramedic SteveHarris finds himself on a canal boat. T

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: In the final show of this run, Birmingham biker paramedics Steve Harris and Mark Hayes race to bring a man back to life. Essex biker cops crack down on death-trap wheels and a learner driver gets more than she expected.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The team are called out to a status 2 emergency; Clark Chamberlain was abseiling when he fell from the top of a cliff to the ground. He's now in a critical condition suffering from multiple injuries.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggles to save two young men who are feared drowned at Hahei; a Coromandel motorcyclist is struggling with punctured lungs, and young man is trapped inside a car after a high speed accident.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Rescue chopper team is en route to Whitianga to help save a badly injured stock car driver.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team respond to a call out where an elderly couple in their 60s are in a critical condition after a head on collision.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: As a weather bomb hits, the chopper crew set out on one of the most challenging missions they have ever undertaken 20 miles off shore, a man lays face down at Muriwai beach unable to move.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: A hang glider pilot may have broken his back after a heavy crash-landing, a Manaia man is in a bad way after coming off a sea biscuit at high speed, and a crashed Waikato driver needs an urgent air-lift to hospital to save his life.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: On Great Mercury Island near Coromandel, a scuba diver has surfaced unconscious without a pulse. Without Rescue 1 he may soon be dead.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Shazia Javed meets a youngster with a high temperature.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Patients with mental health problems visit the surgery.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Baby Franke has a rare variant of a genetic disorder.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 8
programme.desc: Michael is concerned about his ongoing erectile dysfunction.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: A two-year-old girl is dealing with low blood sugar levels.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: Two builders are rushed to casualty after a roof collapse.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: On a busy night shift, paramedics rush in 74-year-old Barry, struggling to breathe.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: The hospital is two porters down, marking a big problem for Sister Jane.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight, biker paramedic Steve Harris races to a child who’s been hit by a car for a second time while Mark Hayes suspects he’s got a fake fitter on his hands.Biker cop Martin Ackers has his hands full when he seizes a woman’s car.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.
programme.sub-title: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Trouble With Fixit
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Lock Out
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Similarly Different
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Buzz on Windblade
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza, a mind-controlling queen-bee-'Con who has taken control of a small airport.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Ghosts and Imposters
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo in a western ghost town.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 1
programme.desc: As Optimus prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee, the Bee Team tries to prevent Steeljaw's Pack from teleporting that very threat, the First Decepticon, Megatronus, back into Earth's dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 2
programme.desc: Reunited with Optimus Prime, Bee, and his team must use everything they’ve learned together to stop Megatronus from annihilating Earth and Cybertron in one fell swoop.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 2
programme.desc: With an old score to settle, Bumblebee insists on taking on OVERLOAD alone, while a weakened Optimus must learn to contribute in ways others than combat if his team is to bring down POLARCLAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Metal Meltdown
programme.desc: As Steeljaw learns of a community of Decepticons in a surprising location, Grimlock and Strongarm struggle to improve their teamwork as, together with Bumblebee, they face SABERHORN.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Suspended
programme.desc: After a mistake in the field, Strongarm takes herself out of action just when the team needs her most against fire-­‐starting Decepticons CRAZYBOLT and SLICEDICE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Cover Me
programme.desc: Windblade's concern for Optimus' wellbeing may spell doom for the entire Away Team when they run up against a sly hunter of a Decepticon named RAZORPAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Brianpower
programme.desc: Grimlock forgets how to fight when, in an effort to become smarter, he downloads a huge amount of data into his brain and overwrites his combat instincts.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Misdirection
programme.desc: More hints about Decepticon Island are revealed when Steeljaw invades the Scrapyard with a clever plan, and Bumblebee, Grimlock and Strongarm confront SCORPONOK, one of the Island's leaders.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bumblebee's Night Off
programme.desc: After being coaxed into going to a concert given by his favorite band, Bumblebee hopes for a quiet evening away from the Scrapyard, but finds action and danger when BISK attacks the arena.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Impounded
programme.desc: Grimlock's quest for an effective disguise goes into overdrive when QUILLFIRE returns and Bumblebee and Strongarm find themselves stuck in an impound lot.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Portals
programme.desc: Fixit's efforts to repair the GroundBridge go horribly awry, instead summoning two of the most legendary and fearsome Decepticons to the Scrapyard – and banishing Bumblebee to another dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Graduation Exercises
programme.desc: Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadvertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 1
programme.desc: With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 2
programme.desc: Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: History Lessons
programme.desc: Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Strongarm's Big Score
programme.desc: When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Not wanting the overaggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a “solo mission” to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mighty Big Trouble
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mini–Con Madness
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Worthy
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 1
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 2
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heat seeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Defrosted
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant “teacher” Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Blurred
programme.desc: While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bee Cool
programme.desc: BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern, while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Great Divide
programme.desc: When Stunticon Drag Strip steals a powerful Cybertronian artifact known as a Gravitic Adjuster, the Bee Team gives chase but are caught in an explosion that once again fuses them into the Ultra Bee Team Combiner (UBTC).

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Get a Clue
programme.desc: A string of mysterious explosives thefts leave the Bee Team flummoxed, but Strongarm is convinced that there's a criminal mastermind at work.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER, a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Disordered Personalities
programme.desc: After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix, assuming that whomever wins will be crowned the literal “ruler of the roads.”

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Survivorman: Portland Oregon
programme.desc: Les goes to a secret location just outside of Portland, Oregon with his friend and filmmaker Devon Massyn in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: Forced to land his ultralight aircraft due to a miscalculation in fuel, Survivorman is once again out to endure the elements for seven days in this spectacular locale… the Australia Outback.

programme.title: Survivorman: Searching the Southwest
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. Locals report encounters in haunted mountains and spooky canyons, and Les applies scientific methods and his survival skills to lure the legend out of hiding.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: 24hrs
programme.desc: Les and Bill Engvall survive for 24 hours in the deserts of Nevada.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Survivorman: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: Les will be set adrift in an inflatable life raft off the coast of Belize. Not only does the life raft have a few bad water leaks, but it also leaks air, requiring Les to frequently re-inflate it.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Sierra Nevada Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Les finds himself in the predicament of a lost hiker. Travelling with a typical "day hiker" pack – only provisions for an overnight stay – Les needs to make the most of what he's brought with him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hunting in Temagami
programme.desc: After all his years of wilderness survival, the forests of Ontario's Temagami still rank as some of the most difficult, harrowing and challenging survival experiences Les has ever faced.

programme.title: Survivorman: African Plains
programme.desc: Survivorman Les Stroud arrives in South Africa via hot air balloon, and must immediately contend with potential danger from lions, hippos, water buffalo and the deadly black mamba.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Summer
programme.desc: This one-hour special chronicles Les's first time surviving for the cameras in August of 2001. With just two cameras, a few items and his wits, Les survives in the Canadian wild.

programme.title: Survivorman: Legend of Klemtu Hill
programme.desc: There's a volcano in British Columbia where Bigfoot reports are in the hundreds. According to locals, a mysterious animal leaves tracks and even kills people. Les braves the dangers of this Bigfoot hotspot to find the truth behind these strange reports.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on a deserted island in the archipelago of Tonga with a long-time friend to relive the story of marooned sailors.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young bride-to-be is gunned down in her own home. The attack is personal and as investigators start digging, they uncover the man she loved was living a lie.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant and it is unknown if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida; their corpses are found floating in Tampa Bay with a hand-written note by one of the victims by. putting it on five billboards to helps them find the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Four young adults are murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, with little evidence but two people walking by dressed in black.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young college student is found dead in her apartment and the autopsy rules the death a homicide by an unknown male suspect.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The killer removed the computer that links him to the murder of a woman and her soon-to-be ex-husband that he had met online.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A real estate developer is shot and his wife becomes the prime suspect, until the bullet is linked to a weapon reported missing 20 years ago.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A body is found stuffed into a suitcase forcing the police to search though the landfill for another missing victim.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nursing student goes missing, investigators find her car, which contains the key to an unknown location that could provide important clues.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mask is discovered near the crime scene and police are hoping that it will lead to the killer of a funeral director.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A meticulous killer leaves behind just one hair, but three years later that one hair links the crimes.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues to find the person behind a gruesome murder, after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool helps to turn a cold case around.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding, investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A ruthless serial killer terrorises a small Texas town.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by mobile phone forensics.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a six year old girl disappears from church during a Sunday service, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children in the church shadows. A psychological profile of the perpetrator lead investigators to taxi cab driver.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: At the end of a murder mystery event, a real death occurs. The death initially looks like an accident but forensic evidence suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Whilst out riding with her husband, a woman dies in an apparent riding accident, but her husband doesn't appear as grief-stricken as he should be.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A twisted killer murdered prostitutes and left their bodies in plain sight. Evidence of treads and threads enable police to track him down.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks - all fronted by an elderly couple.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals. A tip leads them to the alleged perpetrators.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a farmer's wife disappears, the tests of a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist lead to a surprising revelation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When someone dies under mysterious circumstances, the spouse almost always is a suspect - especially if they are in bed, sleeping beside the individual at the time of their death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a patient in a hospital emergency room said he cut his hand on a dumpster, the doctor recognised the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two of America's premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill, investigators immediately view the hundreds of prisoners as suspects.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nine year old girl headed for school vanishes from her quiet suburban neighborhood, an entire community starts searching for her abductor. Investigators wonder if her long-lost mother might be connected to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a state trooper is attacked, investigators uncover a `signature' that links the assault to the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman vanishes under mysterious circumstances, investigators use cat hairs and insects to track her down.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Blood spatter analysis and an investigation lead police to the truth when a pregnant woman is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother is determined to discover what happened when her daughter is injured in a hit and run accident.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother and daughter vanish whilst out shopping. When the girl turns up dead, the mother is the initial suspect, but who really killed her?

programme.title: Mega Transports: Conveyance of the Norwegian Joy
programme.desc: Meyer Werft in Germany is one of the biggest shipbuilders in the world. But it's problem is as big as the ships it builds: the coast and sea are 50 kilometres away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Siberian Ice Road
programme.desc: A Mega Transport on one of the most dangerous roads in the world. The Siberian Ice Road. It doesn't forgive mistakes. It's treacherous. And unpredictable.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Wind Park
programme.desc: A wind park needs to get from Europe to Asia. Over two thousand tons of highly sensitive and valuable cargo. On one of the world's largest heavy lift vessels.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Stolen Power
programme.desc: Twenty-five kilometers off the coast of Holland, a brave crew of construction workers struggles to erect sixty tall turbine-driven windmills in the wild North Sea. The giant blades of these monster machines will spin at 400 km per hour.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Crossing the Colorado
programme.desc: In a rugged canyon, just downriver from the Hoover Dam, a team of construction veterans is hard at work, building the biggest concrete-arch bridge on the continent.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Hard Rock Park
programme.desc: In Myrtle Beach, South Carolina a team of engineers have just one year to build the world’s first Rock and Roll theme park, Hard Rock Park.

programme.title: Mega Builders: London Olympic Aquatics Centre
programme.desc: A group of engineers in England and Wales has taken on the biggest challenge of the next Summer Olympic Games -- the construction of a complex steel-truss roof for the new Aquatics Centre.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: With a price tag of 6 Billion American Dollars, The Gotthard Base Tunnel, between Lucerne and Milan, is a mega project by any standard.

programme.title: Mega Builders: King of Container Ships
programme.desc: 3000 shipyard workers build the World's Biggest Container Ship in the biggest little shipyard around, in Odense, Denmark.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Best Of
programme.desc: This season Mega Builders Vl will take viewers back to some of the most amazing engineering projects we’ve ever covered over the past five seasons to see them reach completion after years of hard work.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Suspension Bridges
programme.desc: Suspension bridges – impressively wide and stretched high over supporting cables or stay cables. The landscape-shaping icons: The superlative Golden Gate, Akashi Kaikyo, Aizaih, El Baluarte and Russky Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Road Bridges
programme.desc: Road bridges: gigantic constructions of modern road traffic. Europa and Ganter Bridge, Öresund bridge, Sunshine Skyway and Viaduct de Millau.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Steel Bridges
programme.desc: Steel bridges are extremely durable and multifunctional, fascinating not only due to its gigantic size but also because of the army of workers keeping the bridges in shape: whether on the historical landmark in Sydney or ultramodern mega bridges in China.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Moving Bridges
programme.desc: Moving Bridges: Exotic milestones on moveable infrastructure. Historically significant: the Kaiser Wilhelm Bridge and the Michigan Avenue bridge. Mechanically unique: the Pont Jacques, the Gateshead Millennium Bridge or the Scale Lane Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel
programme.desc: Building the world's largest structure of snow and ice is a mega challenge of towering proportions. Anything can go wrong. And often it does.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sinking Wings
programme.desc: The goal is to turn the coastal waters off southern British Columbia in Canada into the wreck-diving capital of the world by sinking massive objects, wait a few years for the fish to move in, and the corals to grow.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Glitz City
programme.desc: In Las Vegas -- the quintessential city of razzle-dazzle and bling -- MGM is going for the ultimate one-upmanship.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warden
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation’s most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Timber Theft
programme.desc: A large group of Michigan conservation officers in the state's Upper Peninsula team up to serve warrants on a business owner who is cutting down more timber than his contract stipulates.

programme.title: Wardens: ORVs in the Spring
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer checks riders of off-road vehicles during a busy weekend in May. And the wildlife division bands ducks in an urban area.

programme.title: Wardens: Archery and Firearm Deer
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southwest corner and south-central part of the state patrol deer hunters during the archery and firearm seasons. Also, a look into generous donations of food from hunters.

programme.title: Wardens: Honesty Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol during the deer openers for both archery and firearm season. A DNR employee enjoys visiting state parks with her family.

programme.title: Wardens: Teaching, Fishing, and Fawn
programme.desc: A conservation officer in Michigan's District 6 encounters a captive fawn while officers in D2 patrol walleye anglers. An officer also works as a college professor while he's off-duty.

programme.title: Wardens: Hot Boats
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the state's District 7 patrol during a late-summer boat party and also monitor watercraft that may be exceeding the speed limit for boats. Also, a look at geocaching in state parks.

programme.title: Wardens: Teal and Turkeys
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer in D-6 patrols on the opener for teal and geese. D-5 officers recount a turkey case that they never would have been aware of without a tip from a caller.

programme.title: Wardens: September in the UP
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers patrol bear hunters, waterfowlers, and ORV operators in the state's Upper Peninsula during the busy month of September. Also, a look at volunteers cutting shooting lanes for an accessible blind.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish and ORVs
programme.desc: One Michigan conservation officer patrols users of off-road vehicles during the Memorial Day weekend. Other officers check on whitefish anglers in chilly conditions. Also, a look into a walleye survey at a large inland lake in the UP.

programme.title: Wardens: Winter Recreation and Firearm Deer
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer in D-7 checks on snowmobilers and ice anglers during a chilly February weekend. Another officer in D-7 and one in D-1 check on hunters during the firarm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer, Foraging, and Scenarios
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in the state's District 8 look into a case of trespassing and violating the safety zone law during the firarm deer season. Two experts in wild mushroom foraging go hunting for edibles and share their knowledge.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Patriot Award
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southeast part of the state check on deer hunters that may be trespassing and within the safety zone of an occupied dwelling during the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Fowl
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer looks into an illegal deer during firearm deer season. The state's DNR offers tips on how to bag a bear, and conservation officer recruits receive lessons in operating snowmobiles.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Michigan Sturgeon
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in both the Upper and Lower Peninsulas monitor hunters during the firearm deer seaon, as well as a look at the state's efforts to help the sturgeon population in state waters.

programme.title: Wardens: Walleye and Women
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol walleye anglers on the Detroit River and a DNR class focuses on getting more women into the outdoors.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Conservation Officers
programme.desc: Outdoor Channel donates a check for a memorial to honor fallen conservation officers, and a look at what it takes to be a Michigan CO as well as some of the out-of-the-box missions that the job requires.

programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: Conspirators carry out a plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944.

programme.title: I Am Soldier
programme.desc: A military chef (Tom Hughes) undergoes rigorous physical and psychological testing to join the elite branch known as the Special Air Service.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A young man (Taylor Lautner) must run for his life soon after learning that the folks who raised him are not his real parents.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince (Jack Turner) who is heir to the throne lands in hot water for his partying ways, a PR consultant is hired by the royal family to perform some damage control.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Pax Romana
programme.desc: When we left Magnus, Will, Henry and Kate, they had met with a hostile welcome upon gaining access to the city of Praxis in Hollow Earth.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Hangover
programme.desc: Finding the front door left ajar and furniture turned over, Magnus arrives home to discover the building’s defense protocols disabled, no one in sight, and the Sanctuary in alarming disarray.

programme.title: Sanctuary: One Night
programme.desc: Will and Abby go on a dinner date, but on the way to the restaurant, their flirtatious exchange is abruptly halted when they are forced into a van at gunpoint.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The team gathers for their scheduled morning meeting with Will uncharacteristically absent. Kate goes to his room to find out where he is and discovers that although he feels normal, he doesn’t look the part.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Wingman
programme.desc: Will is getting ready for his big date with Abby while Henry prepares for a romantic night out with Erika. When the two meet in the hallway, they realize that they have made the same reservation for the same restaurant and the same time.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Awakening
programme.desc: During an excursion to East Africa to investigate a former Praxian stronghold, Magnus and Tesla are surprised to find a secret chamber.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Normandy
programme.desc: In a look back to 1944 and World War II, Magnus has learned of a new weather controlling device developed by the Nazis and intended to be deployed against the approaching allied armada.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: The Purple Red
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: In the exciting season opener, the surviving members of Mutant X emerge from a deadly explosion to meet Lexa, who makes them begin to question fundamental assumptions about their world.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team must stop the auction of a highly lethal substance that a number of notorious international terrorists are vying to acquire.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team is brought in to help a military base that has become infected with a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team must stop a serial killer who leaves clues to his next victims in the form of puzzles.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: When Lexa is unknowingly drugged with a lethal substance, the team must race to find the antidote before it's too late.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team is called in to investigate bizarre activities occurring at a local hospital.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid races against the clock to find Zo'or, who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: Zo'or kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the man's body as a 'vessel' in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to 'test' the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Time Bomb
programme.desc: While examining Ma'el's ship, Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Fields
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears. Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about "the fields" where something vital to the Taelons' survival is harvested.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Apparition
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker, which he saw in a dream. It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him. Da'an berates Zo'or for his money and power hungry attitude.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: One Taelon Avenue
programme.desc: Joshua Doors is running his own technology development company and Renee goes undercover to find out what is going on. An artificial intelligence program of the Taelons that controls human minds seems to be acting on its own.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction: The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch helps Sian cover a clown tattoo that's scaring the life out of anyone who sees it. Jay has to deal with Emma's extremely intimate cat portrait. Daz needs assistance covering a boastful tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Glen devours Harri's fast food foul-up, while Sketch knocks out boxer Russell's tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne from getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Glen tackles Hannah's four-letter faux pas, and Jay gives firefighter Simon a hot design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Emma needs Jay's help with a warning sign. Alice assists Louise with her eye-popping ink.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives Leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sketch covers Chris's boastful nickname, and Glen removes Darren's chat-up line leg art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch is monkeying around with Jenny, Joe's Gary Lineker tat gets the red card and Alice fixes Sannahs unfortunate inking error.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa pays tribute to her idol Robbie Williams, while Jack covers his literal leg tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Tattoo Fixers - Xmas Special
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are going all Santa by giving the nations' worst tattoo disasters the cover ups they desperately need.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A father and son team battle it out to get their vintage buses ready for the Brooklands bus show. Plus, a man tries to bring his great grandfather's motorcycle dreams back from the dead.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Volunteer Mark visits bike building maestro, Allen Millyard to choose two models for Brooklands Motorcycle day. Two museum members fulfil their friend John's automobile dreams, and a WW1 Sopwith Camel biplane goes through its MOT.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Bus-obsessed radio DJ Ed Adoo gets the ultimate driving lesson in a double decker. Plus, a rare cutting-edge bike from the past is saved by modern engineering.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Mini makeover reduces its owner to tears. A replica, 1925 cycle car that's taken six years to build, comes a cropper at Brooklands, and a workhorse of the skies battles against the elements.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: In a re-run of the first ever British Grand prix, a rare pre-war race car, the Halford Special, is lined up to compete against a well-preserved Bugatti.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Actor, writer and comedian, Sanjeev Bhaskar visits Brooklands so he can re-live a previous supersonic experience. Also, the earliest ever Triumph motorcycle is unveiled.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the abandoned underground branch line between Holborn and Aldwych. At Holloway Road they find out about the Tube network's only spiral escalator.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway travel under Hampstead Heath to visit the incomplete North End station. Though abandoned before completion, this station was reborn during the Cold War as a nuclear bunker.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused parts of Piccadilly Circus, perhaps the grandest station on the London Underground, and visit the long-abandoned Highgate surface station.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the hidden parts of Euston, including unique features not found elsewhere, They also examine the bits which are set for demolition to make way for HS2.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: A night-time adventure as the hosts go on a late-night exploration of two of London's least known stations. St Mary's and the original Aldgate East, they're only a few hundred metres apart but trains haven't stopped at either since 1938.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore Clapham South deep level shelter where thousands of Londoners slept in the war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.desc: The Liverpool and Manchester Railway, which revolutionised rail travel when it opened in 1830, including introducing the first signalling system.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Scientists battle to try to prove if the Turin Shroud is genuinely the burial cloth used to wrap Jesus' dead body, or if it's a fake.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: As the Nazis tore through Europe, they plundered numerous museums in search of holy relics that they believed would grant them untold power. Experts investigate these stories and whether Hitler really was close to discovering the Holy Grail.
programme.sub-title: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Near Mount Ararat in Turkey is what scientists believe is a boat-shaped rock formation, but a research team hopes to prove it's the remains of Noah's Ark.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of the Aztec and Maya civilisations that grant supernatural powers. Experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artefacts or simply modern-day fakes.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Crystal Skulls

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilisations, explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is back on the road in his food truck and this time he's heading West to Bristol, the hometown of TV presenter and social media queen Maya Jama. Big Zuu will get ready to cook Maya Jama meal to remember.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: New. James Acaster has asked Zuu to cook for him while he records his hit podcast Off Menu. Zuu prepares a dessert that has them both fearing they may have bitten off more than they can chew.Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu, Tubsey and Hyder travel to an exclusive golf course on the south coast, where they have been asked to cook up a feast for former football manager, and king of the jungle, Harry Redknapp.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Judi Love has asked Zuu to prepare her a slap-up meal for after her appearance on `Loose Women'. Judi is the queen of seafood, so Zuu digs deep to bring her the ultimate seafood boil, complete with a whole lobster, scallops and crab butter.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
